title: Substation Phasor Coupling: Fewest Multiplier Primitives
strategies: trivial: one multiplier primitive per non-zero harmonic (mode-3) fiber (matches the checker baseline B0)
greedy: cheapest of the three fiber decompositions (fewest non-zero fibers over a mode)
strong: exact slice-rank (column-space) factorization along the best mode; beats every fiber decomposition but not the unknown optimum
open: search below the slice-rank bound (planted rank is over-complete, so the true minimum stays unknown)
